The duck agreed, and they played. They ran, jumped and laughed. Then, something unexpected happened. The duck came back and splashed into the water. The duck was happy to be safe and dry.

Once upon a time, there was a fish. The fish lived in a pond. The fish was not like other fish. Peter was mean. He wanted the fish to make it pretty.
One day, the fish met a new fish. The big fish said, "Do you want to play with me?" The big fish said, "Yes! Let's play together!"
They played and laughed all day. But then, something unexpected happened. The big fish started to move! It was not a fish at all. The big fish and the fish were scared.
The big fish tried to help the big fish find his home. But the big fish was okay. The big fish was not mean. The big fish was sad too. They both went back to the water.

Once upon a time, there was a bunny. The bunny lived in a big forest. The bunny was very sad because it could not marry. One day, the bunny met a big bear. The bear wanted to play with the bunny, but the bunny was too small.
The rabbit saw a big bear. The bear was sad and asked the bear to help him. The bear said, "You cannot marry your home, but I can help you be happy." The bear did not want to give the bear back.
The bear and the bear became good friends. They played together every day. The rabbit also saw some animals and became good friends. They learned that being sad is good. And the bear always had a friend to play with.

Once upon a time, there was a little cat. The cat was very sad. He walked and talked. He had lost his ball.
The little cat ran to his friend, a wise old owl, on his roar. The owl told the cat to be kind to others. The owl helped the cat get her ball. The cat was happy and thanked the owl.
The wise owl and the bird became good friends. They played together near the big tree every day. The little cat learned that helping others, but sometimes, it's not a good thing. And they both learned that even though the big cat, they still need a lot of help when they needed it.

Once upon a time, there was a frog. The frog liked to jump. The frog was very tired. The frog liked to play with things in the pond.

Once upon a time, there was a little fish. The little fish liked to swim all day long. He was very good at swimming.
One day, the little fish saw a big oak tree with a long stick stuck in it. The tree had the hole to lift it up. The little fish tried to get the oakal, but the oak tree was too small.

Once upon a time, there was a duck. The duck lived in a pond. One day, the duck met a new friend, a duck. The duck was happy to play with the new fish.
"Hi, duck! Do you want to play with me?" the duck said, showing his new friend. The duck was excited and started to play. But then, something unexpected happened. The duck began to panic. The duck and the duck played with the new fish together.

Once upon a time, there was a bird. The bird was very hot. It wanted to fly. The bird did not want to fly. It flew high in the sky.
One day, the bird flew too far away. The bird saw a big tree. The tree had a hole. The bird was brave. The bird wanted to help.
The bird came back fast. It flew to the tree. But the tree was not good. It tried to fly, but it could not fly. The bird was too big. They had to punish their nest. The bird was sad.

Once upon a time, there was a little bear. He was very worried. The bear was sad because he could not find his way back home. The bear felt bad and wanted to help the bear find his way home.
The bear was very kind and helped the bear find his home. The bear was very sorry and happy to have his home. He learned that it is better to take care of his friends and help others. And sometimes, they went on an adventure to find friends and help them find lots of fun things.
